# Menopausal Hormone Therapy and Long-term All-Cause and Cause-Specific Mortality

JAMA

Published Online: September 12, 2017

Podcast 6 min 26 sec

   

1x

0:00 / 0:00

[Subscribe to Podcast](https://sites.jamanetwork.com/audio/)

[Download MP3](https://traffic.libsyn.com/jamaauthorinterviews/Menopausal_Hormone_Therapy_and_Long-Term_All-Cause_and_Cause-Specific_Mortality.mp3)

Interview with JoAnn E. Manson, MD, DrPH, author of Menopausal Hormone Therapy and Long-Term All-Cause and Cause-Specific Mortality: The Women’s Health Initiative Randomized Trials
